components.text:
Hi {{1}}, quick reminder from TBWX 🧇

The old franchise price of *₹1.5 Lakhs + GST* closes on *18th May*. Just 3 days left.

After 18th, pricing moves to ₹4–7 Lakhs standard slab — no exceptions.

40+ outlets already running. 8–12 month ROI. 100+ sqft is enough.

If you've been thinking about it, this is the window.

Reply YES and our team will share the agreement today.
Closing 18th May. Reply STOP to opt out.
